title: Ubiquiti UVC-G4 Doorbell Pro - UniFi Protect G4 Doorbell Pro
category: Cameras, security / Videophones and bells / Door Bells
description: The G4 Doorbell Pro is a WiFi-enabled video doorbell equipped with a primary 5MP camera and a secondary 8MP package camera . The doorbell's main camera is equipped with IR LED to provide enhanced night vision that, when combined with the built-in porch light, ensures a reliably clear surveillance feed around the clock. The G4 Doorbell Pro also features echo-cancelling, two-way audio so you can interact with visitors, and its programmable display allows you to give alerts or delivery… Streams 1080p HD video at 30 FPS Dual-band WiFi Gigabit Ethernet via UACC-Adapter-DBPOE adapter - not included in the package (1) 5MP camera with an IR LED [Video output: 1600x1200 (2MP), 30 FPS] (1) 8MP package camera [Video output: 1600x1200 (2MP), 2 FPS, no IR LED] Two-way audio with echo cancellation Built-in porch light that illuminates objects up to 2 meters away Motion detection sensor IPX4-rated, weather-resistant casing Programmable display Easy, Bluetooth-powered setup via the UniFi Protect mobile app Managed with the UniFi Protect application: Version 1.21.0 and later (web) / 1.5.8 or later (iOS) / 1.4.8 or later (Android) Device (2) cable reduction (2) mounting bracket Attachment material DIN power supply
specsSearch: Camera Illumination IR Illumination range [m] 2 Viewing Angle [°] 138 Wireless features WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g Image Resolution 5MP Max. resolution [pixels] 1600 x 1200 (UXGA) Connectors and Interfaces Audio Microphone, Speaker Other features LCD display Power Power type AC terminal Power via connector/terminal 16 .. 24V AC
